panels.description: Total income received in the selected period

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(amount) AS income
FROM analysis_cash_flow
WHERE meta_category = 'Income'
  AND email = '$email'
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)

panels.title: Income

panels.description: Total expenses in the selected period

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ABS(SUM(amount)) AS expenses
FROM analysis_cash_flow
WHERE meta_category = 'Expense'
  AND email = '$email'
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)

panels.title: Expenses

panels.description: Income minus expenses in the selected period

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(amount) AS net_cash
FROM analysis_cash_flow
WHERE meta_category IN ('Income', 'Expense')
  AND email = '$email'
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)

panels.title: Net

panels.description: Most recent transaction date in the database

targets.rawSql:
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(updated_at)) * 1000 AS last_import
FROM transaction_journals

panels.title: Last Import

panels.description: Cumulative income and expenses over the selected period, both starting from zero

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  w.week_start AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS `Income`
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_SUB($__timeTo(), INTERVAL seq WEEK) AS week_start
  FROM (
    SELECT @row := @row + 1 AS seq
    FROM information_schema.columns a,
         information_schema.columns b,
         (SELECT @row := -1) r
    LIMIT 520
  ) series
) w
JOIN analysis_cash_flow t
  ON t.`date` >= $__timeFrom()
  AND t.`date` <= w.week_start
  AND t.email = '$email'
  AND t.meta_category = 'Income'
WHERE w.week_start >= $__timeFrom()
  AND w.week_start <= $__timeTo()
GROUP BY w.week_start
ORDER BY w.week_start

SELECT
  w.week_start AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS `Expenses`
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_SUB($__timeTo(), INTERVAL seq WEEK) AS week_start
  FROM (
    SELECT @row := @row + 1 AS seq
    FROM information_schema.columns a,
         information_schema.columns b,
         (SELECT @row := -1) r
    LIMIT 520
  ) series
) w
JOIN analysis_cash_flow t
  ON t.`date` >= $__timeFrom()
  AND t.`date` <= w.week_start
  AND t.email = '$email'
  AND t.meta_category = 'Expense'
WHERE w.week_start >= $__timeFrom()
  AND w.week_start <= $__timeTo()
GROUP BY w.week_start
ORDER BY w.week_start

SELECT
  w.week_start AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS `Net`
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_SUB($__timeTo(), INTERVAL seq WEEK) AS week_start
  FROM (
    SELECT @row := @row + 1 AS seq
    FROM information_schema.columns a,
         information_schema.columns b,
         (SELECT @row := -1) r
    LIMIT 520
  ) series
) w
JOIN analysis_cash_flow t
  ON t.`date` >= $__timeFrom()
  AND t.`date` <= w.week_start
  AND t.email = '$email'
  AND t.meta_category IN ('Income', 'Expense')
WHERE w.week_start >= $__timeFrom()
  AND w.week_start <= $__timeTo()
GROUP BY w.week_start
ORDER BY w.week_start

panels.title: Income and Expenses Over Time

panels.description: Monthly income vs expenses

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN meta_category = 'Income' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS `Income`,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN meta_category = 'Expense' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)), 2) AS `Expenses`
FROM analysis_cash_flow
WHERE email = '$email'
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month

panels.title: Monthly Cash Flow

panels.description: Expense breakdown by Firefly III category

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  category,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(amount)), 2) AS amount
FROM analysis_txs
WHERE email = '$email'
  AND meta_category = 'Expense'
  AND category IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY amount DESC

panels.title: Spending by Category

panels.description: Balance of each asset account at end of selected period

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  a.name AS account,
  REPLACE(at2.type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci, ' account', '') AS account_type,
  CASE WHEN a.active = 1 THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Inactive' END AS status,
  DATE_FORMAT(MAX(CAST(tj.date AS DATE)), '%d/%m/%Y') AS last_activity,
  ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS balance
FROM transactions t
JOIN transaction_journals tj ON t.transaction_journal_id = tj.id
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = t.account_id
JOIN account_types at2 ON a.account_type_id = at2.id
JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id
WHERE at2.type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci IN ('Asset account', 'Loan', 'Mortgage')
  AND u.email = '$email'
  AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND CAST(tj.date AS DATE) <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('$acct_status' = 'All' OR CASE WHEN a.active = 1 THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Inactive' END = '$acct_status')
GROUP BY a.name, at2.type, a.active
ORDER BY a.active DESC, at2.type, balance DESC

panels.title: Account Balances

panels.description: Total value of all investment accounts

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS portfolio_value
FROM transactions t
JOIN transaction_journals tj ON t.transaction_journal_id = tj.id
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = t.account_id
JOIN account_types at2 ON a.account_type_id = at2.id
WHERE at2.type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = 'Asset account'
  AND a.name REGEXP 'RESP|LIRA|TFSA|RRSP|FHSA'
  AND a.active = 1
  AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND CAST(tj.date AS DATE) <= $__timeTo()

panels.title: Total Portfolio Value

panels.description: Balance of each investment account

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  a.name AS account,
  DATE_FORMAT(MAX(CAST(tj.date AS DATE)), '%m/%d/%Y') AS last_update,
  ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS balance
FROM transactions t
JOIN transaction_journals tj ON t.transaction_journal_id = tj.id
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = t.account_id
JOIN account_types at2 ON a.account_type_id = at2.id
WHERE at2.type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = 'Asset account'
  AND a.name REGEXP 'RESP|LIRA|TFSA|RRSP|FHSA'
  AND a.active = 1
  AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND CAST(tj.date AS DATE) <= $__timeTo()
GROUP BY a.name
ORDER BY balance DESC

panels.title: Investment Account Balances

panels.description: Weekly running balance per investment account over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(w.week_start) AS time,
  a.name AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS balance
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_SUB($__timeTo(), INTERVAL seq WEEK) AS week_start
  FROM (
    SELECT @row := @row + 1 AS seq
    FROM information_schema.columns a,
         information_schema.columns b,
         (SELECT @row := -1) r
    LIMIT 520
  ) series
) w
JOIN transactions t ON t.deleted_at IS NULL
JOIN transaction_journals tj
  ON t.transaction_journal_id = tj.id
  AND CAST(tj.date AS DATE) <= w.week_start
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = t.account_id
JOIN account_types at2 ON a.account_type_id = at2.id
WHERE at2.type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = 'Asset account'
  AND a.name REGEXP 'RESP|LIRA|TFSA|RRSP|FHSA'
  AND a.active = 1
  AND w.week_start >= $__timeFrom()
  AND w.week_start <= $__timeTo()
GROUP BY w.week_start, a.name
ORDER BY w.week_start, a.name

panels.title: Portfolio Value Over Time

panels.description: Spending by category over time (monthly totals)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)) AS time,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(amount)), 2) AS amount,
  category AS metric
FROM analysis_txs
WHERE email = '$email'
  AND meta_category = 'Expense'
  AND category IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%Y-%m-01'), category
ORDER BY time, category

panels.title: Monthly Spending by Category

panels.description: Percentage of income retained as savings in the selected period

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    100.0 * (SUM(CASE WHEN meta_category = 'Income'
                      THEN amount ELSE 0 END)
           + SUM(CASE WHEN meta_category = 'Expense'
                      THEN amount ELSE 0 END))
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN meta_category = 'Income'
                      THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 1
  ) AS savings_rate
FROM analysis_cash_flow
WHERE email = '$email'
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)

panels.title: Savings Rate

panels.description: Ratio of dining out (restaurants, delivery, coffee, snacks) to total food spending

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    100.0 * ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci IN (
        'Food and Drink - Restaurants',
        'Food and Drink - Delivery',
        'Food and Drink - Coffee Shops',
        'Food and Drink - Snack Food',
        'Food and Drink - Alcohol')
      THEN amount ELSE 0 END))
    / NULLIF(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
        LIKE 'Food and Drink%' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)), 0), 1
  ) AS dining_out_pct
FROM analysis_txs
WHERE email = '$email'
  AND meta_category = 'Expense'
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)

panels.title: Dining Out Ratio

panels.description: Breakdown of spending into essential needs vs discretionary wants

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci IN (
      'Food and Drink - Groceries',
      'Household - Utilities',
      'Household - Rent',
      'Household - Home Insurance',
      'Household - Rental Insurance',
      'Household - Repairs',
      'Financial - Mortgage Payment',
      'Financial - Child Support',
      'Financial - Life Insurance',
      'Vehicles - Gasoline',
      'Vehicles - Insurance',
      'Vehicles - Servicing',
      'Vehicles - Parts',
      'Household - Clothing')
      OR category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LIKE 'Health%'
    THEN 'Needs'
    WHEN category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LIKE 'Financial - Interest'
      OR category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LIKE 'Financial - Credit Card Interest'
      OR category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LIKE 'Financial - Mortgage Payment'
      OR category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LIKE 'Financial - Service Charges'
      OR category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LIKE 'Financial - Credit Card Annual Fees'
    THEN 'Debt and Fees'
    ELSE 'Wants'
  END AS bucket,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(amount)), 2) AS amount
FROM analysis_txs
WHERE email = '$email'
  AND meta_category = 'Expense'
  AND category IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)
GROUP BY bucket
ORDER BY amount DESC

panels.title: Needs vs Wants vs Debt

panels.description: Interest earned (income) vs interest paid (debt) in the selected period

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN meta_category = 'Income'
    AND category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci IN (
      'Financial - Interest',
      'Financial - Savings Interest')
    THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS `Earned`,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN meta_category = 'Expense'
    AND category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci IN (
      'Financial - Interest',
      'Financial - Credit Card Interest')
    THEN amount ELSE 0 END)), 2) AS `Paid`
FROM analysis_txs
WHERE email = '$email'
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)

panels.title: Interest

panels.description: Monthly interest earned vs paid over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)) AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN meta_category = 'Income'
    AND category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci IN (
      'Financial - Interest',
      'Financial - Savings Interest')
    THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS `Earned`,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN meta_category = 'Expense'
    AND category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci IN (
      'Financial - Interest',
      'Financial - Credit Card Interest')
    THEN amount ELSE 0 END)), 2) AS `Paid`
FROM analysis_txs
WHERE email = '$email'
  AND category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci IN (
    'Financial - Interest',
    'Financial - Credit Card Interest',
    'Financial - Savings Interest')
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%Y-%m-01')
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Monthly Interest

panels.description: All active subscriptions with monthly and annualized cost

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  REPLACE(category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci, 'Subscriptions - ', '') AS subscription,
  COUNT(*) AS charges,
  DATE_FORMAT(MAX(`date`), '%Y-%m-%d') AS last_charge,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(amount)) / GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()), 1), 2) AS monthly_avg,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(amount)) / GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()), 1) * 12, 2) AS annual_cost
FROM analysis_txs
WHERE email = '$email'
  AND meta_category = 'Expense'
  AND category COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LIKE 'Subscriptions%'
  AND $__timeFilter(`date`)
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY annual_cost DESC

panels.title: Subscription Tracker

panels.description: Spending change per category: current month vs previous month

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(m1.category, m2.category) AS category,
  CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(@m1_start := DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 0 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01'), '%b %Y')) AS `_dummy_m1`,
  COALESCE(m1.amt, 0) AS recent_month,
  COALESCE(m2.amt, 0) AS prior_month,
  ROUND(COALESCE(m1.amt, 0) - COALESCE(m2.amt, 0), 2) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT category, ROUND(ABS(SUM(amount)), 2) AS amt
  FROM analysis_txs
  WHERE email = '$email'
    AND meta_category = 'Expense'
    AND category IS NOT NULL
    AND `date` >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND `date` < DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), '%Y-%m-01')
  GROUP BY category
) m1
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT category, ROUND(ABS(SUM(amount)), 2) AS amt
  FROM analysis_txs
  WHERE email = '$email'
    AND meta_category = 'Expense'
    AND category IS NOT NULL
    AND `date` >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND `date` < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
  GROUP BY category
) m2 ON m1.category = m2.category
UNION
SELECT
  m2b.category,
  NULL,
  0 AS recent_month,
  m2b.amt AS prior_month,
  ROUND(0 - m2b.amt, 2) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT category, ROUND(ABS(SUM(amount)), 2) AS amt
  FROM analysis_txs
  WHERE email = '$email'
    AND meta_category = 'Expense'
    AND category IS NOT NULL
    AND `date` >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND `date` < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
  GROUP BY category
) m2b
WHERE m2b.category NOT IN (
  SELECT category
  FROM analysis_txs
  WHERE email = '$email'
    AND meta_category = 'Expense'
    AND category IS NOT NULL
    AND `date` >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND `date` < DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), '%Y-%m-01')
)
ORDER BY delta DESC

panels.title: Month-over-Month Spending Delta

panels.description: HELOC, Loan, and Mortgage balance trajectory over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(w.week_start) AS time,
  a.name AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS balance
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_SUB($__timeTo(), INTERVAL seq WEEK) AS week_start
  FROM (
    SELECT @row := @row + 1 AS seq
    FROM information_schema.columns a,
         information_schema.columns b,
         (SELECT @row := -1) r
    LIMIT 520
  ) series
) w
JOIN transactions t ON t.deleted_at IS NULL
JOIN transaction_journals tj
  ON t.transaction_journal_id = tj.id
  AND CAST(tj.date AS DATE) <= w.week_start
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = t.account_id
JOIN account_types at2 ON a.account_type_id = at2.id
WHERE at2.type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci IN ('Loan', 'Mortgage')
  AND a.active = 1
  AND w.week_start >= $__timeFrom()
  AND w.week_start <= $__timeTo()
GROUP BY w.week_start, a.name
ORDER BY w.week_start, a.name

panels.title: Debt Paydown Progress

panels.description: Categories where current month spend exceeds twice the rolling 6-month average

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  cm.category,
  cm.amt AS last_full_month,
  ROUND(hist.avg_amt, 2) AS six_month_avg,
  ROUND(cm.amt / hist.avg_amt, 1) AS ratio
FROM (
  SELECT category, ROUND(ABS(SUM(amount)), 2) AS amt
  FROM analysis_txs
  WHERE email = '$email'
    AND meta_category = 'Expense'
    AND category IS NOT NULL
    AND `date` >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND `date` < DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), '%Y-%m-01')
  GROUP BY category
) cm
JOIN (
  SELECT category,
    ABS(SUM(amount)) / 6 AS avg_amt
  FROM analysis_txs
  WHERE email = '$email'
    AND meta_category = 'Expense'
    AND category IS NOT NULL
    AND `date` >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 7 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND `date` < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY($__timeTo()), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
  GROUP BY category
  HAVING avg_amt > 10
) hist ON cm.category = hist.category
WHERE cm.amt > hist.avg_amt * 2
ORDER BY ratio DESC

panels.title: Spending Anomalies

panels.description: Monthly cost breakdown by utility provider: Shaw (Internet), Telus (Cellphone), Electricity, Natural Gas, and Town of Canmore (Water/Recycling)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%SHAW%' THEN 'Shaw (Internet)'
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%TELUS%' THEN 'Telus (Cellphone)'
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%UTILNET-BVP-EL%' THEN 'Electricity'
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%UTILNET-BVP-NG%' THEN 'Natural Gas'
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%CANMORE%UTILITI%' THEN 'Town of Canmore (Water/Recycling)'
  END AS provider,
  COUNT(*) AS charges,
  DATE_FORMAT(MAX(CAST(tj.date AS DATE)), '%Y-%m-%d') AS last_charge,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(t.amount)), 2) AS total,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(t.amount)) / GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()), 1), 2) AS monthly_avg,
  ROUND(ABS(MIN(t.amount)), 2) AS max_charge,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(t.amount)) / GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()), 1) * 12, 2) AS annual_cost
FROM transactions t
JOIN transaction_journals tj ON t.transaction_journal_id = tj.id
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = t.account_id
JOIN account_types at2 ON a.account_type_id = at2.id
JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id
WHERE at2.type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = 'Asset account'
  AND t.amount < 0
  AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND tj.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND u.email = '$email'
  AND $__timeFilter(tj.date)
  AND (tj.description LIKE '%SHAW%'
    OR tj.description LIKE '%TELUS%'
    OR tj.description LIKE '%UTILNET-BVP-EL%'
    OR tj.description LIKE '%UTILNET-BVP-NG%'
    OR tj.description LIKE '%CANMORE%UTILITI%')
GROUP BY provider
HAVING provider IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY annual_cost DESC

panels.title: Utilities Breakdown

panels.description: Monthly utility costs by provider over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CAST(tj.date AS DATE), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)) AS time,
  ROUND(ABS(SUM(t.amount)), 2) AS amount,
  CASE
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%SHAW%' THEN 'Shaw (Internet)'
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%TELUS%' THEN 'Telus (Cellphone)'
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%UTILNET-BVP-EL%' THEN 'Electricity'
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%UTILNET-BVP-NG%' THEN 'Natural Gas'
    WHEN tj.description LIKE '%CANMORE%UTILITI%' THEN 'Town of Canmore (Water/Recycling)'
  END AS metric
FROM transactions t
JOIN transaction_journals tj ON t.transaction_journal_id = tj.id
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = t.account_id
JOIN account_types at2 ON a.account_type_id = at2.id
JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id
WHERE at2.type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = 'Asset account'
  AND t.amount < 0
  AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND tj.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND u.email = '$email'
  AND $__timeFilter(tj.date)
  AND (tj.description LIKE '%SHAW%'
    OR tj.description LIKE '%TELUS%'
    OR tj.description LIKE '%UTILNET-BVP-EL%'
    OR tj.description LIKE '%UTILNET-BVP-NG%'
    OR tj.description LIKE '%CANMORE%UTILITI%')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(CAST(tj.date AS DATE), '%Y-%m-01'), metric
HAVING metric IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time, metric

panels.title: Utility Costs Over Time

list.definition: SELECT email FROM users ORDER BY email
list.label: Account Email
list.name: email
list.query: SELECT email FROM users ORDER BY email
